content:
I would really appreciate if we could get things like character and wheel portraits, such as the ones attached, shared via some official source.

I'm a big fan of using such artworks for community works, such as those submitted for the [UGC creation submission campaign](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?gid=918300566#gid=918300566).

I personally have my [own project](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gRDzdVHGfCC4qjt5aZYKuU9FWEfWdqREztNGeiczmRk/) that I can no longer source images for, and will likely not continue to update. 

I think sharing materials like this can only benefit you by encouraging community engagement. I just like the way PNGs look, screenshots are ugly 😔
